notes: Constructed wordplay pack revised per #36 review: 5 anagrams + 5 Before & After. Anagrams are natural sentences the answer completes (NO fill-in-the-blank, no call-out); fresh pairs not used in prior wordplay packs and not near-synonyms. Before & After clue both halves without naming either. Pop Star Wars used instead of Rock Star Wars (already in the 2026-06-17 pack).
